focus_points.label: Celebrating the payments refactor win
focus_points.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor — big win, team noticed. It's important to acknowledge contributions to maintain motivation.

focus_points.label: Exploring energy levels this week
focus_points.reason: Looks a bit flat this week, quieter than usual in standup. Could be fatigue, personal matters, or just a quieter stretch — worth checking in.

focus_points.label: Interest in mentoring opportunities
focus_points.reason: Mentioned in passing they'd like to do more mentoring. It's been a few months since discussing this — worth exploring how to support that.

focus_points.label: Upcoming billing rewrite involvement
focus_points.reason: Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite, which they haven't heard about yet. Clarifying expectations and involvement could be beneficial.

focus_points.label: Any blockers on current tasks?
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in topic. It's good practice to see if there are any obstacles they're facing.
